subcodes.first_line: O ye son and daughter of the Kingdom! According to what you have written… O God, my God! We are wedded in love of Thy beauty, in hope of Thy good-pleasure, and in eagerness to be of service to Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابن و بنت ملکوت از قرار مسموع روابطی در میان شما حاصل و با یکدیگر میخواهید اقتران
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for married couples, @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @East and West; communication between East and West, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
